title: Tree-operator module aggregate
summary: Collects the left-comb tree-word, recurrence, defect-cancellation, and first chain-complex modules under one import path.

mathematicalContent.heading: Module role
mathematicalContent.body: This file is an import aggregate. It introduces no Lean declarations of its own; the mathematical objects live in the four Tree modules listed as dependencies.

mathematicalContent.heading: Included layers
mathematicalContent.body: The imported modules define left-comb Laplacian words, path-wise recurrence equations, an abstract recurrence-to-tangentiality interface, and a first Euler-characteristic scaffold.

references.locator: Main ambient construction and tangentiality results
references.note: Motivation for rank-general nested Laplacian words; the Lean tree complex goes beyond what is currently instantiated.

limitations: No theorem is proved in this aggregate file. Verification status must be read from the imported Tree modules individually.
